requests.name: EnrollRoamingCert
requests.body:
<x:Envelope
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
    xmlns:tem="http://tempuri.org/"
    xmlns:one="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/OneCRSWcf"
    xmlns:arr="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
    <x:Header/>
    <x:Body>
        <tem:EnrollRoamingCert>
            <tem:projectCodesetProfile>Beta-MYCRS_AL8W6FGZ</tem:projectCodesetProfile>
            <tem:productCode>IHP0001-NEW</tem:productCode>
            <tem:userProfile>
                <one:Add>JALAN MACALISTER</one:Add>
                <one:BussinessType>C</one:BussinessType>
                <one:Citizenship>MY</one:Citizenship>
                <one:City>GEORGE TOWN</one:City>
                <one:CompAdd>JALAN MACALISTER</one:CompAdd>
                <one:CompCity>GEORGE TOWN</one:CompCity>
                <one:CompCountry>MY</one:CompCountry>
                <one:CompFaxno></one:CompFaxno>
                <one:CompName>ISLAND HOSPITAL SDN. BHD.</one:CompName>
                <one:CompPostcode>10450</one:CompPostcode>
                <one:CompRegNo>199401038023</one:CompRegNo>
                <one:CompState>09</one:CompState>
                <one:Comptel>0444422222</one:Comptel>
                <one:Country>MY</one:Country>
                <one:Dob>22-09-1990</one:Dob>
                <one:Email>uatuserone01@gmail.com<</one:Email>
                <one:Faxno></one:Faxno>
                <one:Idno>IHPDOCTOR10</one:Idno>
                <one:Idtype>PP</one:Idtype>
                <one:Name>DOCTOR IHP TEN</one:Name>
                <one:Postcode>10450</one:Postcode>
                <one:State>09</one:State>
                <one:Telhome>0444422222</one:Telhome>
                <one:Telmobile>0192222222</one:Telmobile>
            </tem:userProfile>
            <tem:document>
                <arr:KeyValueOfstringSupportingDocumentIjg_S6yAZ>
                    <arr:Key>NRIC/Passport</arr:Key>
                    <arr:Value>
                        <one:FileType>PDF</one:FileType>
                        <one:Image>cid:1422848599096</one:Image>
                    </arr:Value>
                </arr:KeyValueOfstringSupportingDocumentIjg_S6yAZ>
                <arr:KeyValueOfstringSupportingDocumentIjg_S6yAZ>
                    <arr:Key>Authorization Letter</arr:Key>
                    <arr:Value>
                        <onec:FileType>PDF</onec:FileType>
                        <one:Image>cid:1422848599097</one:Image>
                    </arr:Value>
                </arr:KeyValueOfstringSupportingDocumentIjg_S6yAZ>
            </tem:document>
            <tem:PIN>Pin123456@</tem:PIN>
            <tem:sendNotice>1</tem:sendNotice>
        </tem:EnrollRoamingCert>
    </x:Body>
</x:Envelope>
